# `healthcare` — healthcare templates

**Industry:** Healthcare / Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates exploiting healthcare anxiety and HIPAA compliance

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Template details

### Patient Portal Security Alert

- **File:** [`patient_portal_security.html`](patient_portal_security.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/healthcare_education.html`](education/healthcare_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Security Alert: Unusual access to your patient records
  - Action Required: Verify your patient portal account
  - MyChart: Suspicious login detected on your account
- **Operator notes:** Security-alert lure targeting patients and healthcare staff familiar with portals like MyChart. The suspicious-login pretext drives urgency. Most credible when branded to the EHR/portal system your organization actually uses.

### Insurance Verification Request

- **File:** [`insurance_verification.html`](insurance_verification.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/healthcare_education.html`](education/healthcare_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Your insurance verification is incomplete
  - Insurance coverage update needed before your appointment
  - Your health insurance information needs to be verified
- **Operator notes:** Effective across healthcare and general staff — insurance prompts feel routine and personal. The appointment/coverage angle motivates quick action without alarm. A strong beginner-level baseline for HIPAA-conscious organizations.

### HIPAA Compliance Alert

- **File:** [`hipaa_compliance_alert.html`](hipaa_compliance_alert.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.From}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/healthcare_education.html`](education/healthcare_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - HIPAA Compliance: Mandatory training due by Friday
  - Compliance Alert: Your HIPAA certification has expired
  - Required: Complete HIPAA security awareness update
- **Operator notes:** Best for healthcare sector employees. The regulatory authority of HIPAA creates strong urgency.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
